requirements.description: Multi-model routing engine with configurable fallback chains
Supabase Auth with RBAC (Admin/Developer/Viewer), RLS enforcement
API key management with per-key usage tracking, SHA-256 hashing
Per-request cost and latency tracking with model/prompt/endpoint breakdown
Real-time dashboard with Recharts (cost trends, latency p50/p95/p99, error rates)
Prompt version control with named versions, diff view, rollback
A/B test framework with statistical significance and auto-stop at 95% confidence
Evaluation pipeline with judge LLM, scoring rubrics, human review queue
Token-bucket rate limiting with 4-stage graceful degradation
Webhook anomaly alerts with configurable rules and cooldown
PII redaction with configurable retention policies
Model configuration UI for temperature, max tokens, system prompts
Request playground with streaming and live token counter
Export CSV/JSON for cost reports and evaluation results
